build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && cargo build --release -p warder-cli

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:5173 ws://127.0.0.1:5173; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local safety controls for supervised agent sessions.
bundle.longDescription: Warder provides a native Linux GUI for configuring protected paths, launching supervised local agent sessions, and reviewing receipts and journals.
